unlocks.name: Extra Peon
unlocks.description: Start every match with +1 Peon already queued.

unlocks.name: Starting Scout
unlocks.description: Start every match with 1 Scout (auto-revealed adjacent zone).

unlocks.name: Starting Footman
unlocks.description: Start every match with 1 Footman defending the Palace.

unlocks.name: Starting Healer
unlocks.description: Start every match with 1 Healer in your zone.

unlocks.name: Starting Hero
unlocks.description: Start every match with the Hero unit already trained.

unlocks.name: Starting Farm
unlocks.description: Start every match with 1 Farm pre-built adjacent to the Palace.

unlocks.name: Starting Granary
unlocks.description: Start every match with 1 Granary pre-built.

unlocks.name: Starting Barracks
unlocks.description: Start every match with 1 Barracks pre-built.

unlocks.name: Starting Watchtower
unlocks.description: Start every match with 1 Watchtower covering the Palace approach.

unlocks.name: Starting Wall Row
unlocks.description: Start every match with 3 Wall segments pre-built around your Palace.

unlocks.name: Iron Hill Skin
unlocks.description: Unlock the Iron Hill palette: gunmetal stone + deep-blue banners.

unlocks.name: Amber Vale Skin
unlocks.description: Unlock the Amber Vale palette: golden stone + amber banners.

unlocks.name: Ashfall Skin
unlocks.description: Unlock the Ashfall palette: charred stone + ember banners.

unlocks.name: Deepwood Skin
unlocks.description: Unlock the Deepwood palette: weathered wood + moss banners.

unlocks.name: Frostkeep Skin
unlocks.description: Unlock the Frostkeep palette: ice-veined stone + silver banners.

unlocks.name: Hero: Knight-Errant
unlocks.description: Unlock the Knight-Errant hero — +20% damage, ignores zone-of-control.

unlocks.name: Hero: Shieldmaiden
unlocks.description: Unlock the Shieldmaiden hero — +40% defense, 2-hex defensive aura.

unlocks.name: Hero: Archmage
unlocks.description: Unlock the Archmage hero — Wizard with +50% spell damage + 3-hex range.

unlocks.name: Hero: Cartographer
unlocks.description: Unlock the Cartographer hero — Scout with permanent zone visibility.

unlocks.name: Hero: Warlord
unlocks.description: Unlock the Warlord hero — gives +10% damage to every stack within 5 hex.

unlocks.name: Bounty: No Trade
unlocks.description: Bounty match: AI factions refuse all trade. Win to earn +2 lore tokens.

unlocks.name: Bounty: Double Aggression
unlocks.description: Bounty match: AI military aggression weight doubled. Win to earn +3 lore tokens.

unlocks.name: Bounty: Permanent Fog
unlocks.description: Bounty match: no permanent zone reveal — fog returns after units leave. Win to earn +3 lore tokens.

unlocks.name: Bounty: No Walls
unlocks.description: Bounty match: Wall + Watchtower buildings disabled. Win to earn +4 lore tokens.

unlocks.name: Bounty: 5-Minute Time Attack
unlocks.description: Bounty match: hard time limit of 5 minutes. Win to earn +5 lore tokens.

unlocks.name: Lore Chapter I: The First Strata
unlocks.description: Unlock Chapter I of the Aethelgard lore — readable from the main menu.

unlocks.name: Lore Chapter II: The Sundering
unlocks.description: Unlock Chapter II of the Aethelgard lore.

unlocks.name: Lore Chapter III: Houses of Stone
unlocks.description: Unlock Chapter III of the Aethelgard lore.

unlocks.name: Lore Chapter IV: The Necropolis Rising
unlocks.description: Unlock Chapter IV of the Aethelgard lore.

unlocks.name: Lore Chapter V: The Eternal Flame
unlocks.description: Unlock Chapter V of the Aethelgard lore — the final chapter.

unlocks.name: Chain Starter: Economy / Harvest
unlocks.description: Start the match with `steel-plows` already purchased (×1.5 harvest).

unlocks.name: Chain Starter: Economy / Trade
unlocks.description: Start the match with `trade-route` already purchased (Trade panel open).

unlocks.name: Chain Starter: Economy / Cap
unlocks.description: Start the match with `bulk-baskets` already purchased (+25 supply cap).

unlocks.name: Chain Starter: Military / Infantry
unlocks.description: Start the match with `forgedBlades` already purchased (+5 attack damage).

unlocks.name: Chain Starter: Military / Archer
unlocks.description: Start the match with `iron-tipped-arrows` already purchased (+1 attack range).

unlocks.name: Chain Starter: Military / Siege
unlocks.description: Start the match with `sapper-training` already purchased (-15% siege build time).

unlocks.name: Chain Starter: Diplomacy / Relations
unlocks.description: Start the match with `first-contact` already purchased (Embassy half-cost).

unlocks.name: Chain Starter: Diplomacy / Trade
unlocks.description: Start the match with `exchange-policy` already purchased (Trade panel open).

unlocks.name: Chain Starter: Magic / Offense
unlocks.description: Start the match with `mage-tower-aura` already purchased (Mage Tower aura +1).

unlocks.name: Chain Starter: Magic / Utility
unlocks.description: Start the match with `scrying-orb` already purchased (5-hex Wizard map-reveal).

unlocks.name: Chain Starter: Engineering / Defense
